name: Hivemaster Helm
description: A unique helm that gives up its speedy ability and some of its defense to summon 3 bees to help you in battle. It also gives a hefty speed boost to compensate for the loss of Speedy.
effects: On party: Inflicts Berserk within 4 tiles for 6 seconds Summon 3 bees to aid the player in combat for 6 seconds Bee Attack: 120 damage every 0.6 seconds Bee Range: 4 sqrs Red Bee Effect: Inflicts Curse for 4 seconds after being active for 1.6 seconds
